name: One Day Love: The Series
overview: This is the story of Roi, Kyle and his friends who went to a private resort to refresh and unwind. Roi, the owner of the resort, saved Kyle, who fell on the pool and nearly drowned. At first they weren't comfortable with each other because of differences in their background and character. Eventually, they became friends. But what happens next?

trailers.title: Official Trailer One Day Pag-ibig | New Filipino (Pinoy) BL Series 2021
